questions.question: What is the primary difference between Hadoop and Relational Database Management Systems (RDBMS) in terms of data storage and management, as discussed in Chapter 8 of the course material?
questions.hint: Focus on the key aspects of Hadoop's architecture and RDBMS limitations

questions.question: Describe the key advantages of using Hadoop over RDBMS for big data analytics, as outlined in the course material (Chapters 8.1-8.8).
questions.hint: Cover scalability, fault tolerance, and data processing capabilities

questions.question: What is the significance of Hadoop's distributed processing architecture, as explained in Chapter 8 of the course material? Provide a brief example to illustrate its benefits.
questions.hint: Focus on the concept of distributed processing and its real-world applications
